description_long: This is a dark gray military jet aircraft with a sleek, angular fuselage and a sharply pointed nose. The wings are delta-shaped and set low on the body, with red and white roundel insignias visible on the upper surfaces. The tail section features a single vertical stabilizer and a deployed drag parachute extending from the rear, indicating a landing or deceleration scenario. The cockpit is positioned forward on the fuselage and appears to be enclosed with a clear canopy. The aircraft has visible landing gear beneath the fuselage and wings, and various small details such as antennas and panel lines are present. The overall design suggests a high-speed, maneuverable jet suitable for urban flyovers or display.
description: A dark gray, delta-winged military jet with a pointed nose, forward cockpit, and a deployed drag parachute at the rear. Red and white roundels and detailed panel lines accentuate its sleek, angular design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the jet, the pointed nose, single vertical stabilizer, and the deployed drag parachute trailing behind.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sharp nose, forward cockpit canopy, delta wing shape, and the circular parachute canopy behind the tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the fuselage, wing, and parachute deployment.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the open parachute canopy, with the delta wings extending outward.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-mounted delta wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine integrated within the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
